and connect to a contract at a specified address.\n- The code is boilerplate, with no dynamic execution, no user input processing, no network requests beyond establishing a blockchain connection, and no embedded secrets.\n- The ABI functions are read-only, and the code serves as an interface wrapper.\n\n---\n\n### Issue-by-issue review:\n\n#### 1. **Report 1**\n\n- **Purpose & Sources:** Correctly
